dialog.speaker: Director Higgins
dialog.text: Ahem! It's getting very late, counselor.

dialog.speaker: Director Higgins
dialog.text: All campers to their cabins. NOW.

dialog.speaker: Director Higgins
dialog.text: And you — get some rest by the fire. Big day tomorrow.

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: *from Marcus's cabin, muffled* No no no... the lines won't stop...

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: A GLASS PYRAMID! The building is ENORMOUS!

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: The painting is WRONG! Something is MISSING!

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: I can't stop... the lines keep coming...

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: A woman's face... golden frames everywhere...

dialog.speaker: Marcus
dialog.text: I have to draw it... I HAVE to draw it ALL!

dialog.speaker: Pink Panther
dialog.text: *whispers* He's not even awake... Higgins needs to know.

dialog.speaker: Pink Panther
dialog.text: I heard Marcus freaking out in his cabin. Something about paintings and pyramids.

dialog.speaker: Pink Panther
dialog.text: I need to check on him. His cabin is in the camp grounds.
